seo.keywords: MC Vicky, Gethu, Harrish Jeyaraj, MC Vicky, Sharmila, Yevanda Ivan full lyrics, Gethu songs lyrics, Yevanda Ivan lyrics snippets, Yevanda Ivan WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Yevanda Ivan lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Yevanda Ivan celebrates confidence and charisma, portraying a character who is a 'next level playa' and a 'rockstar'.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Gethu, the song reflects the protagonist's vibrant personality and his journey through challenges with a lively spirit.

Who are the artists behind the song?

The song features the talented vocals of MC Vicky and Sharmila, with lyrics also penned by MC Vicky.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Yevanda Ivan was composed by the renowned Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was the song released?

Yevanda Ivan was released on December 31, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Yevanda Ivan from Gethu is a high-energy track that embodies the spirit of youth and celebration. It showcases the protagonist's lively persona, emphasizing themes of confidence and charisma. The infectious beats and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of excitement and joy, making it a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations. With its vibrant collaboration between MC Vicky and Sharmila, the song leaves listeners feeling motivated and ready to take on the world.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yevanda Ivan from Gethu is an electrifying anthem that perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. With a unique collaboration between the dynamic vocals of MC Vicky and Sharmila, this track is sure to get you on your feet. The vibrant beats crafted by Harrish Jeyaraj elevate the song to a whole new level of excitement.
stanzaMeanings: What are you doing now, friend? He is a next-level player.
What are you doing now, friend? He is a really cool hustler. What are you doing now, friend? He is a rockstar.
What are you doing now, friend? He is a big deal.
This guy is causing trouble here, making a scene and wasting time.
Oh no, where is this guy from? He was born and raised here, making a lot of noise.
He will come looking for you. He will throw you around, hitting you left and right with punches.
Oh no, if you look into his eyes, it's scary. If he gets angry, he will take your life away.
Look at this guy, he is a troublemaker. He eats food and drinks but is a bad person.
This guy is a local guy, causing trouble. Who is this guy? There are no other people like him here.
Look at him, he is making a scene and coming to show off his skills.
Whatever you say, he will listen. Look at him, he is acting all cool!
What are you doing now, friend? He is a next-level player.
What are you doing now, friend? He is a really cool hustler. What are you doing now, friend? He is a rockstar.
What are you doing now, friend? He is a big deal.
Don't talk too much, just look at him. He is a big deal, you should see him.
He will keep asking and asking, and if you don't answer, he will stick a sticker on you.
What are you saying? I am just giving you a warning. Are you going to ask for trouble?
Oh no, he is a different kind of guy. If you say something, he will come back at you.
He is going to hit you with a single punch, and that opponent will remember him.
Look at this guy, he has finished his sketch. Look at him, he is a different kind of guy here.
He is smiling, looking cool. He is just showing off his style.
Whatever you say, he will listen. Look at him, he is acting all cool!
